feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, Kyma runtime Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Sample code for creating a responsive popover on hove...
entry.content:
Hi @ashibedi,

How about using the "tooltip" attribute of an image component in a Table Cell, like an Icon?

Here is a sample:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.m.ImageContent/sample/sap.m.sample.ImageContent

Here is a sample you can use for a Popover button in UI5:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.m.Popover/sample/sap.m.sample.Popover/code

Then you could extend the button with the hover functionality to display what you want:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/d5b756bf4e9a4d67961fa21e1ba12c9e 

You could adapt the code to your needs while displaying an Icon on a Table Cell. 

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Warning message : Duplicate check not possible; required fields Tax number not filled
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

We are encountering a warning message " Duplicate check not possible; required fields Tax number not filled "  even though post populating the tax number along with tax category. Can anyone help why this warning message is popped up and how to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards, 

Resh

entry.title: Re: its possible create SAP notes?
entry.content:
Hi @caio_dh_consultig,

I believe what you are looking for is a way to deliver your software to SAP customers in such a way that they would be able to install it with ease. 

SAP Notes contain attachments and are created by SAP only (as mentioned here already) as means to distribute software corrections that can be applied via SNOTE transaction. 

However, you can use Add-on Assembly Kit (AAK) to create your own software and distribute to customer so they can easily install and uninstall it from their SAP instances using standard Add-On Component Management transactions such as SAINT:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ADD-ON_ASSEMBLY_KIT

That approach is the correct way to distribute any ABAP code to customers as it clearly demands your code to have a namespace defined and standard and known procedures to get it installed/uninstalled.  And, in order to achieve this, you ought to certify your add-on with SAP. This is all explained on the documentation I linked here.

Some Consulting Firms will grab a Transport Request directly from the filesystem and send it to a customer to be imported into their own system. That should be OK as long as the customer understands that the ABAP code contained in that TR will have no relation to SAP and it is considered on "Customer's Domain" - usually assigned to a 'Z' or 'Y' namespace that cannot be traced back to who originally code it.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Automatic replication of GL accounts from MDG to ECC...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check following note and test again:

  • 2977608 - Error when navigating to Single processing for G/L account

Best Regards,
Norman

entry.title: Re: eDocument Romania - Supplier Invoice - SOAP:1033 Oper...
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

leaving the solution I found myself with a troubleshooting note of another country (Mexico)...

the logical port of the involved consumer proxy must be deleted and re-created, identical, but this time in the operation lists the new operations will show up. 

Hope this helps! 

Thank you
Regards

entry.title: Re: How can I find out what version of RAP I am using
entry.content:
Hi @BODHISATTWA__20,

RAP is simply a framework that has to be followed when creating extensions on an S/4HANA system. 

The important fact here is to ensure the development model used is ABAP Cloud.

Please read more:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/abap/abap-cloud-faq

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/make-use-of-abap-cloud-support-in-the-abap-development-tools-for-eclipse/ba-p/13558622

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-check-your-custom-code-for-abap-cloud/ba-p/13567124

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content:
Hello @Ivan-Mirisola,

I understand that for developer extensibility in an #SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment, it is achieved using Core Data Services to provision data, and for front-end applications, we can do it with Fiori Elements. However, I'm not entirely clear if it's possible to develop a pro code freestyle application and deploy it in an S/4HANA Public Cloud environment.

Additionally, I would like to know the step-by-step process of configuring the connection between BTP and S/4HANA Public Cloud, from setting up the communication scenario, configuring the communication user, to creating the destination. Typically, the step of creating the communication scenario is skipped, and the destination creation is done with the scenario data. For example, I have the following case:

  1. I downloaded the certificate from the Security/Destinations section in BTP.
  2. I created a communication scenario in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system and uploaded the certificate in SAML.
  3. I configured a destination to the ERP API.
  4. I tried to deploy the Fiori application using the destination but couldn't do it.

Your assistance would be greatly appreciated as this is an important project for the region.

Regards, Anthony

entry.title: Re: its possible create SAP notes?
entry.content: I'm sorry to insist, but this notes will not edit standard reports, they will create z products.

entry.title: multi-day absence entry
entry.content: Currently, multi-day absence is keyed in as one line with a start date and end date. This creates challenges to report absences that span across multiple weeks, months, and years for a clean weekly, monthly and yearly report. A lot of data clean-up needs to be done to declutter the days first. Is it possible to change the configuration to single day entry?

entry.title: Navigating OData Service Customization in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm engaged in a project on SAP BTP ABAP environment and encountering challenges with OData services. Traditionally, in the on-premises ABAP environment, we could utilize the SEGW transaction to create and adjust OData services, including renaming entities to meet our naming standards or needs. However, SEGW is not accessible in the SAP BTP ABAP environment, where RAP has become the preferred technology. I'm exploring alternative methods to achieve similar outcomes.

One of our goals is to rename navigation properties (associations) in OData services generated from referenced CDS views. I aim to align the names of navigation properties in OData services with our project's naming guidelines, preferring "Entity" over the usual "toEntity".

Additionally, I've encountered issues with reserved words, such as CDS fields, in the SAP BTP ABAP environment, which were not problematic in on-premises settings (link).

The reason I wish to keep the services identical (at a metadata level) in SAP BTP ABAP environment and on-premises is to connect the new cloud OData services to existing development resources, such as Fiori applications and third-party integrations.

Creative solutions or indirect methods may be necessary due to these limitations. Any advice, tips, or documentation references would be highly valued.

Looking forward to your insights and suggestions.

Thank you!

Rafael

entry.title: Logs not getting printed for users having name length greater than 50 characters
entry.content:
Logs are not being printed for users with names exceeding 50 characters. Upon investigating, it was discovered that the column size for the 'User' in the Logs table is set to 50 characters, thus limiting the logging for longer names.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Logs not getting printed for users having name length...
entry.content:
This action won't be logged in the event log; instead, it will solely store data in memory without any log record. To register information in the log, you must utilize the log.write method. This method offers various implementations, differing only in the number of parameters used. Similarly, the trace.write method places records in the developer console.

In essence, the key distinction between the developer console and the event log lies in data retention. The event log ensures permanent storage by storing data in a database table for up to two weeks, whereas the developer console does not utilize a database and thus cannot retain data as part of the event log. Therefore, utilizing the log.write methods remains the sole method to store information in the event log.

entry.title: Applicant Status Configuration Export
entry.content: Is there any way to Export the configured Applicant Status Sets from STG to PRODUCTION? At the moment, we see we have to do manually in Provisioning to bring the new statuses in and also Recruiters have to pull the needed ones into status sets same as their STG Configuration. Is there any easy way to export along with Grouping of a status, required, other selections of status attributes in a status set either from Provisioning or from Front end by Recruiters? Or any way in Integration Center to get all this.

entry.title: Removing table/canvas reports with Stories being released
entry.content: Just wondering if it is really necessary to remove Table or Canvas reports with Stories being released. They are being used to meet different reporting needs and have different use cases. What is the rationale for only keeping Stories in the near future.

entry.title: Re: Story Report Filter Error
entry.content: I am having these same problems now in 2024 - Any advice? I am trying to learn Stories for the big change in Nov 2025 but this is just so frustrating. If it's not one error code, it's another or the system won't even load the report. It's basically a large table report - No graphs or special data analysis, just fields.

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content: Hi @ivan

entry.title: How to change a item from make to buy? When costed it is still putting in labor $$
entry.content: I have a item in one of my plants which is manufacturing a part. It is selling it to the sister plant. This should go at cost to the sister facility. However when the cost roll is done at the sister plant the material is not being picked up correctly and there is also labor coming in as well. The price was loaded into the sister facility and there is no router and BOM. The flag is also set up as a buy item. Any suggestions?

entry.title: Data Load errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST)
entry.content:
Our BW system (SAP BW 7.5 SP 19 on DB6) in EST ran into errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST) change on March 11, 2024. We see errors with "MESSAGE_TYPE_X," "SAPLRS_GENERAL" (or LRS_GENERALU05), and "RSSM_GET_TIME" in the ST22 logs. We believe it's because a data load grabbed a timestamp that was one hour behind an earlier timestamp, causing the system to wait for a non-existent time. This triggered errors when the difference exceeded six seconds.
Instead of removing data loads from the schedule, are there other ways to handle DST changes? Are there any recommended solutions from SAP?

entry.title: Data Load errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST).
entry.content:
Our BW system (SAP BW 7.5 SP 19 on DB6) in EST ran into errors during the recent Daylight Saving Time (DST) change on March 11, 2024. We see errors with "MESSAGE_TYPE_X," "SAPLRS_GENERAL" (or LRS_GENERALU05), and "RSSM_GET_TIME" in the ST22 logs. We believe it's because a data load grabbed a timestamp that was one hour behind an earlier timestamp, causing the system to wait for a non-existent time. This triggered errors when the difference exceeded six seconds.
Instead of removing data loads from the schedule, are there other ways to handle DST changes? Are there any recommended solutions from SAP?

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content: Hi
